_comment: Edit this file to add, remove, or tune sources. The fetch script reads it on every run. A broken or missing feed logs a warning and is skipped, it never stops the whole pull. type controls how the script handles each entry.

rss_sources.name: 10x Genomics Newsroom
rss_sources.note: Feed URL unverified, script will log a warning and skip if it 404s. Fallback options noted in README.

rss_sources.name: Bruker News
rss_sources.note: NanoString is now under Bruker. Feed URL unverified, will skip gracefully if invalid.

rss_sources.name: Bio-Techne Newsroom
rss_sources.note: Feed URL unverified, will skip gracefully if invalid.

rss_sources.name: Molecular Instruments
rss_sources.note: Most direct emerging competitor (HCR vs RNAscope). Feed URL unverified, may need a swap. Site also at hcrimaging.com.

rss_sources.name: Navinci News
rss_sources.note: In situ proximity ligation, competes with ProximityScope. Feed URL unverified.

rss_sources.name: Visiopharm News
rss_sources.note: Image analysis, adjacent ecosystem. Feed URL unverified.

pubmed.name: PubMed
pubmed.query: (spatial transcriptomics[Title/Abstract] OR "in situ hybridization"[Title/Abstract] OR RNAscope[Title/Abstract] OR "spatial biology"[Title/Abstract] OR MERFISH[Title/Abstract]) AND ("last 90 days"[EDAT])
pubmed.note: No API key needed at low volume. Register a free NCBI key later to raise the rate limit if you add more queries.

nih_reporter.name: NIH RePORTER
nih_reporter.advanced_text_search: spatial transcriptomics in situ hybridization RNAscope spatial biology multiplexed imaging
nih_reporter.note: Highest-value sales signal. No auth. Respect 1 request/second. Names PI and institution for territory targeting.
